title: Panchang Computation Engine Extraction Plan
purpose: Extract AG70K internal Panchang dry-run logic into a reusable engine before executing four-location computation.
required_corrections_before_execution: Replace hardcoded +05:30 offset with timezone-aware offset handling.
Support Asia/Kolkata and Asia/Tokyo for the current four-location pilot.
Use AG71H canonical location_id values only.
Keep legacy Itangar id only in alias/reference comparison.

next_step.title: Create Reusable Timezone-Aware Dry-Run Engine
next_step.instruction: Create scripts/lib/panchang-internal-dry-run-engine.mjs from AG70K logic with timezone-aware offset handling, then validate exports before execution.
